zh.Syleham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可希勒哈姆
zh.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆
zh.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Fisher於1623年8月7日之前出生在英國素福爾可希勒哈姆時，他的父親Anthony Fisher32歲，母親Mrs. Alice Fisher31歲。他於1647年9月7日與Johanna Faxon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1645年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世於1670年2月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆
zh-hans.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony Fisher于1623年8月7日之前出生在英国素福爾可希勒哈姆时，他的父亲Anthony Fisher32岁，母亲Mrs. Alice Fisher31岁。他于1647年9月7日与Johanna Faxon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1645年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世于1670年2月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Fisher was born before 7 August 1623, in Syleham, Suffolk, England, his father, Anthony Fisher, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Alice Fisher, was 31. He married Johanna Faxon on 7 September 1647, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1645. He died on 13 February 1670, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Fisher est né avant 7 août 1623, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Anthony Fisher, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alice Fisher, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Faxon le 7 septembre 1647, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1645. Il est décédé le 13 février 1670, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Fisher vor 7. August 1623 in Syleham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anthony Fisher 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Alice Fisher 31. Er hat am 7. September 1647 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Johanna Faxon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1645 hat er in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 13. Februar 1670 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Fisher è nato il prima del 7 agosto 1623 nel Syleham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Anthony Fisher, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Alice Fisher, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Faxon il 7 settembre 1647, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1645. Morì il 13 febbraio 1670, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Syleham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクシレハム
ja.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハム
ja.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニー
ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Fisherが1623年8月7日以前にイギリススフォルクシレハムで生まれた時，父Anthony Fisherは32歳，母Mrs. Alice Fisherは31歳であった。1647年9月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムでJohanna Faxonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1645年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに住んでいた。彼は1670年2月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Fisher(이)가 1623년 8월 7일 이전 영국 수폴크 실함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthony Fisher(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alice Fisher(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1647년 9월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 Johanna Faxon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1645년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 살았다. 그는 1670년 2월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Fisher nasceu antes 7 de agosto de 1623, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anthony Fisher, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alice Fisher, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Faxon em 7 de setembro de 1647, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1645. Ele faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1670, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Fisher родился перед 7 августа 1623 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Anthony Fisher было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alice Fisher, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Faxon 7 сентября 1647 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1645 году. Он умер 13 февраля 1670 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
